Class AgendaService

Namespace
BLL.Services
Assembly
BLL.dll

Business logic service for configuring and querying a sports space's weekly operating schedule (agenda).

public class AgendaService

object

Constructors

AgendaService()

Initializes dependencies from DalFactory singletons.

public AgendaService()

Methods

ConfigurarAgenda(Guid, List<AgendaDTO>)

Atomically replaces the entire agenda of a space by deleting all existing blocks and inserting the new set in a single transaction.

public void ConfigurarAgenda(Guid espacioId, List<AgendaDTO> agendasDto)

Parameters

espacioId Guid

The space whose agenda will be replaced.

agendasDto List<AgendaDTO>

The new schedule blocks. Each block's HoraDesde must be earlier than HoraHasta. Blocks on the same day must not overlap.

Remarks

Known limitation: Agenda ranges crossing midnight (e.g., 22:00-02:00) are explicitly prevented by the UI validation here. They must be split into two ranges: 22:00-23:59 and 00:00-02:00.

Exceptions

ArgumentNullException

Thrown when agendasDto is null.

ArgumentException

Thrown when a block has HoraDesde >= HoraHasta, or when two blocks on the same day overlap.

ArgumentNullException

Thrown if agendasDto is null.

ArgumentException

Thrown if any block has HoraDesde >= HoraHasta, or if two blocks for the same day overlap. Ranges crossing midnight are not supported and must be split.

GetAgendaPorEspacio(Guid)

Returns all agenda blocks configured for the specified space.

public List<AgendaDTO> GetAgendaPorEspacio(Guid espacioId)

Parameters

espacioId Guid

The space to query.

Returns

List<AgendaDTO>

List of AgendaDTO records; empty list if no schedule is configured.
